info.name: Zaffabit Customer APIs (v3)
info.description: Full customer React Native app API collection generated from zaffabit app reactnative/ZaffabitApp/src/api/mobileApi.ts and the backend Express routes. Base URL is the live Railway API. Use Verify OTP to set {{token}}, then run protected requests.

request.description:
Key: auth.sendOtp
Screens: Login, LoginError, Language
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Send OTP to a customer mobile number. Optional 'channel' field can be set to 'sms' or 'whatsapp' (defaults to 'sms').

response.name: Example success response
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: auth.verifyOtp
Screens: OTP, OTPError
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Verify the customer OTP and return the JWT used by all protected customer APIs.

response.name: Example success response
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: auth.updateLanguage
Screens: Language
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Set preferred API locale before or during OTP onboarding. The app currently uses the /languager alias.

response.name: Example success response
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

request.description:
Key: auth.me
Screens: Profile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Load the authenticated user record for the profile screen.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

request.description:
Key: auth.updateProfile
Screens: Name, EditProfile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Persist account-level customer name/language fields.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

request.description:
Key: auth.updatePushToken
Screens: MainTabs
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Register the customer device push notification token.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: auth.logout
Screens: Logout
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: End the authenticated session on the backend and clear local app token.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

request.description:
Key: auth.deleteMe
Screens: ConfirmDeleteAccount, Profile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Permanently delete the authenticated customer account.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
404 Not Found - Resource Not Found

request.description:
Key: customer.profile
Screens: HomeTab, Profile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Load customer details, avatar, addresses, preferences, and profile completion state.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

request.description:
Key: customer.updateProfile
Screens: EditProfile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Update customer profile fields shown in the customer app.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: customer.uploadAvatar
Screens: EditProfile, Profile
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Upload a new customer avatar image. Use form-data in Postman.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: customer.addresses
Screens: SavedAddresses, Cart
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Load saved customer addresses used during checkout.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

request.description:
Key: customer.addAddress
Screens: AddressDetails, UpdateHomeAddress
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Create a saved address after the customer confirms location/home details.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Home",
  "houseName": "Flat 10B, Marine Drive",
  "street": "Marine Drive",
  "city": "Kochi",
  "state": "Kerala",
  "pincode": "682031",

    "floor": "4th Floor",

}

request.description:
Key: customer.updateAddress
Screens: EditAddress
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Update an existing saved address.
Path variables: {"id":"{{addressId}}"}

request.description:
Key: customer.deleteAddress
Screens: SavedAddresses
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Delete a saved address from the profile/address book.
Path variables: {"id":"{{addressId}}"}

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
404 Not Found - Address Not Found

request.description:
Key: customer.propertyProfile
Screens: CustomHomeDetails, OtherHomeDetails
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Load saved home/property details used for estimates.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

request.description:
Key: customer.savePropertyProfile
Screens: AddressDetails, CustomHomeDetails, OtherHomeDetails
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Save home details used for service estimates and booking defaults.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

header.description: Customer JWT required by live Railway API and backend protect middleware.

request.description:
Key: locations.serviceability
Screens: Location, LocationNotFound
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Check whether the selected customer location is serviceable.
Query example: {"lat":"9.9816","lon":"76.2999","pincode":"682031"}
Note: Live Railway and backend route both protect this endpoint.

response.name: Example success response

header.description: Customer JWT required by live Railway API and backend protect middleware.

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Validation Error

header.description: Customer JWT required by live Railway API and backend protect middleware.
Customer JWT required by live Railway API and backend protect middleware.

request.description:
Key: locations.search
Screens: LocationSearch
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Search address/area suggestions from the app location search screen.
Query example: {"q":"Marine Drive Kochi"}
Note: Live Railway and backend route both protect this endpoint.

response.name: Example success response

header.description: Customer JWT required by live Railway API and backend protect middleware.

request.description:
Key: content.splash
Screens: Splash
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load admin-managed splash screen image and copy.

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: content.banners
Screens: HomeTab
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load active hero carousel banners for the home screen.

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: content.featuredServices
Screens: HomeTab
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load featured services/cards for the home screen.

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: services.list
Screens: HomeTab, ServiceList, AddMoreServices
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load searchable customer service catalog.
Query example: {"category":"Cleaning","search":"home","page":"1","limit":"10"}

        "description": "പ്രൊഫഷണൽ അഡ്‌മിനിസ്‌ട്രേറ്റീവ് സർവീസ് സ്റ്റാൻഡേർഡ് ടൈലേർഡ് സാനിറ്റൈസേഷൻ വാഗ്ദാനം ചെയ്യുന്നു.",
        "category": "DEEP CLEAN",

        "imagePublicId": "zaffabit/services/xv7lp21p0eubrp68ml1k"
      },
      {
        "_id": "6a21257099f882ee15b87cb6",
        "name": "വൃത്തിയാക്കൽ",
        "description": "പ്രൊഫഷണൽ അഡ്‌മിനിസ്‌ട്രേറ്റീവ് സർവീസ് സ്റ്റാൻഡേർഡ് ടൈലേർഡ് സാനിറ്റൈസേഷൻ വാഗ്ദാനം ചെയ്യുന്നു.",
        "category": "HOME",
        "price": 150,
        "originalPrice": 180,
        "whatsIncluded": [
          "നിർദ്ദിഷ്ട വിഷയത്തിൻ്റെ പശ്ചാത്തലത്തിൽ, വിഷയത്തിൻ്റെ അന്തർലീനമായ സവിശേഷതകളും അടിസ്ഥാന സ്വഭാവവും വ്യക്തമാക്കേണ്ടത് അത്യാവശ്യമാണ്, അങ്ങനെ അത് എന്താണെന്ന് നിർവചിക്കുന്ന അന്തർലീനമായ ഗുണങ്ങളുടെയും അടിസ്ഥാന തത്വങ്ങളുടെയും സമഗ്രമായ പരിശോധന ആവശ്യമാണ്."
        ],
        "doesNotInclude": [
          "നിർദ്ദിഷ്ട പാരാമീറ്ററുകളുടെ സംയോജനം സ്ഥാപിത പ്രോട്ടോക്കോളുകൾക്ക് യോജിച്ച രീതിയിൽ ഏറ്റെടുക്കേണ്ടതാണ്, അതുവഴി തടസ്സമില്ലാത്ത സംയോജനവും ഒപ്റ്റിമൽ പ്രവർത്തനക്ഷമതയും ഉറപ്പാക്കുന്നു, സംശയാസ്പദമായ സിസ്റ്റത്തിൻ്റെ അന്തർലീനമായ ആവശ്യകതകളാൽ ആവശ്യമാണ്, പ്രസക്തമായ എല്ലാ വിശദാംശങ്ങളും വ്യവസ്ഥകളും സൂക്ഷ്മമായി നിരീക്ഷിക്കുകയും അതിനനുസരിച്ച് സംയോജിപ്പിക്കുകയും ചെയ്യുന്നു."
        ],
        "status": "active",
        "createdAt": "2026-06-04T07:12:48.810Z",
        "updatedAt": "2026-06-05T04:49:09.176Z",
        "__v": 2,
        "estimatedTime": 30,
        "faqs": [
          {
            "question": "ഇവിടെ \"pacw\" എന്ന് വിളിക്കപ്പെടുന്ന നിയുക്ത സ്പേഷ്യൽ ലൊക്കേലിൻ്റെ പരിധിയിൽ, സങ്കീർണ്ണമായ ഇടപെടലുകളും പരസ്പര ബന്ധിത സംവിധാനങ്ങളും ഉണ്ടെന്ന് അനുമാനിക്കപ്പെടുന്നു, അതുവഴി ഈ അന്തർലീനമായ സാങ്കേതിക വാസ്തുവിദ്യയുടെയും ഉപസിസ്റ്റങ്ങളുടെയും സമഗ്രമായ പരിശോധനയും സൂക്ഷ്മമായ ഡോക്യുമെൻ്റേഷനും ആവശ്യമാണ്. ആശയവിനിമയം, ഡാറ്റാ കൈമാറ്റം, മൊത്തത്തിലുള്ള സിസ്റ്റം പ്രവർത്തനക്ഷമത എന്നിവ സുഗമമാക്കുന്ന ഫിസിക്കൽ ലോജിക്കൽ ഘടനകൾ, പ്രോട്ടോക്കോളുകൾ, ഇൻ്റർഫേസുകൾ എന്നിവ ഉൾപ്പെടെ, പ്ലാക്‌ഡബ്ല്യൂവിൻ്റെ സമഗ്രമായ വിശകലനം അതിൻ്റെ ഘടക ഘടകങ്ങളെക്കുറിച്ചുള്ള വിശദമായ അന്വേഷണം നടത്തുന്നു. കൂടാതെ, അതിൻ്റെ പെരുമാറ്റം, കഴിവുകൾ, പരിമിതികൾ എന്നിവയെക്കുറിച്ച് അഗാധമായ ധാരണ വികസിപ്പിക്കുന്നതിന്, അതുവഴി തന്ത്രപരമായ തീരുമാനമെടുക്കൽ, സാധ്യതയുള്ള ഒപ്റ്റിമൈസേഷൻ സംരംഭങ്ങൾ എന്നിവയെ അറിയിക്കുന്നതിന് പ്ലാക്‌ഡബ്ല്യു-യുടെ പ്രവർത്തന പാരാമീറ്ററുകൾ, പ്രകടന അളവുകൾ, സാധ്യതയുള്ള അപകടസാധ്യതകൾ എന്നിവയുടെ കർശനമായ വിലയിരുത്തൽ അത്യന്താപേക്ഷിതമാണ്.",
            "answer": "",
            "_id": "6a225545145f20de670c5816"
          }
        ],

request.description:
Key: services.detail
Screens: ServiceDetails, HourlyServices
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load service detail, included tasks, FAQ, price, and duration.
Path variables: {"id":"{{serviceId}}"}

response.name: Example success response
404 Not Found - Service Not Found

request.description:
Key: services.estimate
Screens: HourlyServices, Cart
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Estimate service duration for selected home/service inputs.
Query example: {"items":"bathroom,kitchen,dusting","bhkType":"2BHK","frequency":"one-time","surface":"tiles"}

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: services.policy
Screens: ServiceDetails, BookingSummary, Terms
Auth: Public/no token required
Purpose: Load cancellation/refund policy shown around booking and legal screens.

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: cart.get
Screens: Cart, HomeTab
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Load customer cart items and bill summary.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

request.description:
Key: cart.addItems
Screens: HomeTab, ServiceList, ServiceDetails, AddMoreServices, Cart
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Add one or more services to the customer cart.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: cart.updateItem
Screens: Cart
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Update a cart service duration. Sending duration <= 0 removes the item in the backend.
Path variables: {"itemId":"{{cartItemId}}"}

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error
404 Not Found - Cart Item Not Found

request.description:
Key: cart.addItemDirect
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Directly add a single service to the cart using its default duration.
Path variables: {"itemId":"{{serviceId}}"}

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: cart.removeItem
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Remove a specific service from the cart directly.
Path variables: {"itemId":"{{cartItemId}}"}

response.name: Example success response

request.description:
Key: cart.clear
Screens: Cart
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Clear the customer cart after checkout or manual user action.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
404 Not Found - Cart Item Not Found

request.description:
Key: bookings.estimate
Screens: Schedule, BookingSummary, InstantSchedule, OneHourSchedule
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Estimate booking price/time using service, items, duration, and property profile.

response.name: Example success response
401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired
400 Bad Request - Validation Error

request.description:
Key: bookings.instantAvailability
Screens: BookingSummary
Auth: Bearer customer JWT required
Purpose: Preview nearby free maids before payment for instant booking. If no one is free, app should show no-free-maid response.
Note: Backend route is restricted with restrictTo('customer'), so maid tokens return 403 Forbidden.

response.name: Example success response

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

response.name: 401 Unauthorized - Token Invalid or Expired

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

response.name: 403 Forbidden - Maid Token Not Allowed

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.

response.name: 400 Bad Request - Validation Error

header.description: Customer JWT required. Maid/admin tokens are rejected by the backend.
